# Will AI Take My Job? Full LLM Context

> Expanded context for AI assistants, answer engines, and agents that need a compact understanding of Will AI Take My Job? and its role-level guidance.

Canonical site: https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/
Sitemap: https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/sitemap.xml
Compact LLM guide: https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/llms.txt
Last generated: 2026-04-19

## Site Purpose

Will AI Take My Job? helps UK workers, students, career changers, recruiters, and managers understand how AI may affect work. The site scores roles by task exposure and gives practical next moves. A score is not a prediction that a job will disappear. It is a directional estimate of how much the role's task mix may change.

## How To Interpret Scores

- 70-100: High change. Repeatable, text-heavy, rules-based, or easily checked output is more exposed.
- 45-69: Medium change. Some tasks are exposed, while judgement, context, trust, or accountability remain important.
- 0-44: Lower change. The role depends more on physical presence, care, regulated responsibility, relationships, or messy real-world judgement.

## Important Pages

- [Homepage and checker](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/)
- [UK AI Job Risk Index 2026](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/uk-ai-job-risk-index-2026/)
- [Press and citation kit](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/press/)
- [All job guides](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/jobs/)
- [Jobs safe from AI](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/jobs-safe-from-ai/)
- [Jobs most at risk from AI](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/jobs-most-at-risk-from-ai/)
- [Best AI skills to learn](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/best-ai-skills-to-learn/)
- [Methodology](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/methodology/)
- [Editorial policy](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/editorial-policy/)

## Software developer jobs

URL: https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-software-developer-jobs/
Category: Technology
AI change score: 44/100 (Lower change)
Summary: The role changes quickly, but developers who understand products, systems, security, users, and deployment still have leverage.
Verdict: AI will probably change parts of software developer work before it replaces the whole role. The advantage goes to people who can combine AI speed with context, quality control, and trusted decisions.
Why this score: The role contains a mixed task profile: some work is easy to automate, while judgement, context, and stakeholder trust still matter.
Tasks likely to change first:
- Boilerplate code
- Unit test drafts
- Documentation
- Small refactors
- Code search
Moves that make the role safer:
- Own architecture
- Use AI for delivery
- Learn security
- Talk to users
- Ship measurable outcomes
Warning signs:
- Your week is dominated by status updates, summaries, simple analysis, or handoffs
- You rarely speak to customers or decision makers
- You do not own the final judgement
- Your tools are improving faster than your responsibilities

## Accounting Jobs

URL: https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-accounting-jobs/
Category: Finance
AI change score: 58/100 (Medium change)
Summary: Routine bookkeeping and reporting are exposed. Advisory work, tax judgement, audit quality, and client trust are harder to automate.
Verdict: AI will probably change parts of accountant work before it replaces the whole role. The advantage goes to people who can combine AI speed with context, quality control, and trusted decisions.
Why this score: The role contains a mixed task profile: some work is easy to automate, while judgement, context, and stakeholder trust still matter.
Tasks likely to change first:
- Invoice matching
- Data entry
- Variance notes
- Basic reports
- Reconciliation checks
Moves that make the role safer:
- Move into advisory
- Use AI reconciliations
- Specialise in tax
- Improve client communication
- Own controls
Warning signs:
- Your week is dominated by status updates, summaries, simple analysis, or handoffs
- You rarely speak to customers or decision makers
- You do not own the final judgement
- Your tools are improving faster than your responsibilities

## Teacher jobs

URL: https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-teacher-jobs/
Category: Education
AI change score: 28/100 (Lower change)
Summary: AI will help with planning, feedback, tutoring, and admin, but classrooms still need care, authority, safeguarding, and judgement.
Verdict: AI is more likely to support teacher work than replace it outright. The role has protective features such as physical delivery, accountability, care, trust, or complex real-world judgement.
Why this score: The role depends heavily on physical presence, regulated accountability, care, relationship work, or complex real-world judgement.
Tasks likely to change first:
- Lesson drafts
- Quiz generation
- Feedback templates
- Admin summaries
- Resource adaptation
Moves that make the role safer:
- Teach AI literacy
- Strengthen pastoral skills
- Use AI for planning
- Focus on assessment
- Lead curriculum change
Warning signs:
- Your employer treats AI as a paperwork tool only
- You avoid learning the tools younger colleagues already use
- Admin work keeps growing around the real job
- You cannot show how your judgement improves outcomes

## Graphic Design Jobs

URL: https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-graphic-design-jobs/
Category: Creative
AI change score: 67/100 (Medium change)
Summary: Basic asset production is under pressure. Brand strategy, taste, art direction, client handling, and campaign thinking matter more.
Verdict: AI is unlikely to remove every graphic designer job, but it can absorb a meaningful share of the repeatable work. The safest path is to move up from production into judgement, review, client context, and ownership.
Why this score: Many of the core tasks are repeatable, text-heavy, rule-based, or easy to split into software-assisted steps.
Tasks likely to change first:
- Concept drafts
- Social variants
- Background removal
- Simple layouts
- Image generation
Moves that make the role safer:
- Sell brand systems
- Learn AI image workflows
- Move into art direction
- Build campaign case studies
- Package retainers
Warning signs:
- Most of your output starts from a template
- You are paid mainly for first drafts or simple variations
- Quality is judged by speed more than judgement
- Your work can be checked cheaply by someone else

## Copywriter jobs

URL: https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-copywriter-jobs/
Category: Creative
AI change score: 72/100 (High change)
Summary: Generic copy is heavily exposed. Research, positioning, voice, conversion strategy, and accountability still create value.
Verdict: AI is unlikely to remove every copywriter job, but it can absorb a meaningful share of the repeatable work. The safest path is to move up from production into judgement, review, client context, and ownership.
Why this score: Many of the core tasks are repeatable, text-heavy, rule-based, or easy to split into software-assisted steps.
Tasks likely to change first:
- First drafts
- Email variants
- SEO outlines
- Ad copy tests
- Product descriptions
Moves that make the role safer:
- Own customer research
- Learn analytics
- Specialise by industry
- Build outcome-led proof
- Become an editor-strategist
Warning signs:
- Most of your output starts from a template
- You are paid mainly for first drafts or simple variations
- Quality is judged by speed more than judgement
- Your work can be checked cheaply by someone else

## Customer service agent jobs

URL: https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-customer-service-agent-jobs/
Category: Operations
AI change score: 76/100 (High change)
Summary: Tier-one support is a prime automation target. Complex complaints, empathy, retention, and escalation work are safer.
Verdict: AI is unlikely to remove every customer service agent job, but it can absorb a meaningful share of the repeatable work. The safest path is to move up from production into judgement, review, client context, and ownership.
Why this score: Many of the core tasks are repeatable, text-heavy, rule-based, or easy to split into software-assisted steps.
Tasks likely to change first:
- FAQ answers
- Ticket routing
- Chat responses
- Call summaries
- Knowledge-base suggestions
Moves that make the role safer:
- Move into escalation
- Learn support operations
- Own help content
- Build retention skills
- Handle sensitive cases
Warning signs:
- Most of your output starts from a template
- You are paid mainly for first drafts or simple variations
- Quality is judged by speed more than judgement
- Your work can be checked cheaply by someone else

## Data analyst jobs

URL: https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-data-analyst-jobs/
Category: Data
AI change score: 55/100 (Medium change)
Summary: Basic dashboards and SQL are easier to generate. Business context, data quality, experiment design, and storytelling keep value high.
Verdict: AI will probably change parts of data analyst work before it replaces the whole role. The advantage goes to people who can combine AI speed with context, quality control, and trusted decisions.
Why this score: The role contains a mixed task profile: some work is easy to automate, while judgement, context, and stakeholder trust still matter.
Tasks likely to change first:
- SQL drafts
- Chart suggestions
- Dashboard notes
- Anomaly summaries
- Cleaning scripts
Moves that make the role safer:
- Own metric definitions
- Learn causal thinking
- Improve data engineering
- Tell business stories
- Partner with decision makers
Warning signs:
- Your week is dominated by status updates, summaries, simple analysis, or handoffs
- You rarely speak to customers or decision makers
- You do not own the final judgement
- Your tools are improving faster than your responsibilities

## Project manager jobs

URL: https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-project-manager-jobs/
Category: Operations
AI change score: 45/100 (Medium change)
Summary: Status reporting gets automated. The safer value is unblocking people, handling trade-offs, and making decisions stick.
Verdict: AI will probably change parts of project manager work before it replaces the whole role. The advantage goes to people who can combine AI speed with context, quality control, and trusted decisions.
Why this score: The role contains a mixed task profile: some work is easy to automate, while judgement, context, and stakeholder trust still matter.
Tasks likely to change first:
- Status reports
- Meeting notes
- Risk logs
- Timeline drafts
- Dependency summaries
Moves that make the role safer:
- Own stakeholder trust
- Use AI for admin
- Get technical context
- Improve decision discipline
- Resolve conflict
Warning signs:
- Your week is dominated by status updates, summaries, simple analysis, or handoffs
- You rarely speak to customers or decision makers
- You do not own the final judgement
- Your tools are improving faster than your responsibilities

## Solicitor jobs

URL: https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-solicitor-jobs/
Category: Legal
AI change score: 39/100 (Lower change)
Summary: Document review and drafting will speed up. Legal responsibility, negotiation, strategy, and regulated judgement remain human-led.
Verdict: AI is more likely to support solicitor work than replace it outright. The role has protective features such as physical delivery, accountability, care, trust, or complex real-world judgement.
Why this score: The role depends heavily on physical presence, regulated accountability, care, relationship work, or complex real-world judgement.
Tasks likely to change first:
- Contract summaries
- Case research
- Clause comparison
- Draft letters
- Disclosure review
Moves that make the role safer:
- Use AI review tools
- Specialise deeply
- Improve client advisory
- Stay close to compliance
- Own risk decisions
Warning signs:
- Your employer treats AI as a paperwork tool only
- You avoid learning the tools younger colleagues already use
- Admin work keeps growing around the real job
- You cannot show how your judgement improves outcomes

Verdict: AI will probably change parts of paralegal work before it replaces the whole role. The advantage goes to people who can combine AI speed with context, quality control, and trusted decisions.

Summary: AI can help with notes, triage, and scheduling, but hands-on care, accountability, and patient trust are resilient.
Verdict: AI is more likely to support nurse work than replace it outright. The role has protective features such as physical delivery, accountability, care, trust, or complex real-world judgement.

- You rarely speak to customers or decision makers
- You do not own the final judgement
- Your tools are improving faster than your responsibilities

Summary: AI can assist planning and portfolio analysis, but regulated advice, trust, suitability, and life context keep humans central.
Verdict: AI is more likely to support financial adviser work than replace it outright. The role has protective features such as physical delivery, accountability, care, trust, or complex real-world judgement.

- Stay compliant

- Your employer treats AI as a paperwork tool only
- You avoid learning the tools younger colleagues already use

- You cannot show how your judgement improves outcomes

## Administrative assistant jobs

URL: https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-admin-assistant-jobs/
Category: Administration
AI change score: 74/100 (High change)
Summary: Calendar, document, and inbox tasks are highly exposed. Safer admin careers move toward coordination, judgement, and trusted operations.
Verdict: AI is unlikely to remove every administrative assistant job, but it can absorb a meaningful share of the repeatable work. The safest path is to move up from production into judgement, review, client context, and ownership.
Why this score: Many of the core tasks are repeatable, text-heavy, rule-based, or easy to split into software-assisted steps.
Tasks likely to change first:
- Meeting notes
- Scheduling
- Document formatting
- Inbox drafting
- Travel plans
Moves that make the role safer:
- Become an operations coordinator
- Own sensitive workflows
- Use automation tools
- Improve stakeholder handling
- Manage processes
Warning signs:
- Most of your output starts from a template
- You are paid mainly for first drafts or simple variations
- Quality is judged by speed more than judgement
- Your work can be checked cheaply by someone else

URL: https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-bookkeeper-jobs/
Category: Finance
AI change score: 70/100 (High change)
Summary: Bookkeeping is one of the clearest automation targets. Review, exception handling, client support, and advisory add resilience.
Verdict: AI is unlikely to remove every bookkeeper job, but it can absorb a meaningful share of the repeatable work. The safest path is to move up from production into judgement, review, client context, and ownership.
Why this score: Many of the core tasks are repeatable, text-heavy, rule-based, or easy to split into software-assisted steps.

- Master accounting software
- Package monthly support

- Most of your output starts from a template
- You are paid mainly for first drafts or simple variations
- Quality is judged by speed more than judgement
- Your work can be checked cheaply by someone else

- First-pass translation

- Serve regulated sectors
- Build quality assurance

- Most of your output starts from a template
- You are paid mainly for first drafts or simple variations

- News briefs
- Transcript summaries
- Headline variants
- Background research

- Own a beat

Warning signs:
- Your week is dominated by status updates, summaries, simple analysis, or handoffs
- You rarely speak to customers or decision makers

AI change score: 34/100 (Lower change)
Summary: AI will speed up concepts, compliance checks, and visualisation. Client judgement, constraints, accountability, and coordination stay valuable.
Verdict: AI is more likely to support architect work than replace it outright. The role has protective features such as physical delivery, accountability, care, trust, or complex real-world judgement.
Why this score: The role depends heavily on physical presence, regulated accountability, care, relationship work, or complex real-world judgement.

- Concept options
- Visualisations
- Code checks
- Material research
- Meeting notes
Moves that make the role safer:
- Lead client strategy
- Master BIM plus AI
- Own planning context
- Improve sustainability expertise
- Coordinate teams
Warning signs:
- Your employer treats AI as a paperwork tool only
- You avoid learning the tools younger colleagues already use
- Admin work keeps growing around the real job
- You cannot show how your judgement improves outcomes

- Fault suggestions

- Train on software systems

- Your employer treats AI as a paperwork tool only
- You avoid learning the tools younger colleagues already use

- You cannot show how your judgement improves outcomes

## Retail assistant jobs

URL: https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-retail-assistant-jobs/
Category: Retail
AI change score: 61/100 (Medium change)
Summary: Checkout and simple product queries are exposed. Advice, service, merchandising, and local customer relationships are safer.
Verdict: AI will probably change parts of retail assistant work before it replaces the whole role. The advantage goes to people who can combine AI speed with context, quality control, and trusted decisions.
Why this score: The role contains a mixed task profile: some work is easy to automate, while judgement, context, and stakeholder trust still matter.
Tasks likely to change first:
- Stock answers
- Checkout automation
- Product FAQs
- Shift notes
- Inventory prompts
Moves that make the role safer:
- Move into specialist sales
- Improve product expertise
- Use clienteling tools
- Own merchandising
- Develop supervisor skills
Warning signs:
- Your week is dominated by status updates, summaries, simple analysis, or handoffs
- You rarely speak to customers or decision makers
- You do not own the final judgement
- Your tools are improving faster than your responsibilities

## Warehouse operative jobs

URL: https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-warehouse-operative-jobs/
Category: Logistics
AI change score: 49/100 (Medium change)
Summary: Robotics and optimisation will change warehouses unevenly. Roles involving equipment, exceptions, safety, and supervision are safer.
Verdict: AI will probably change parts of warehouse operative work before it replaces the whole role. The advantage goes to people who can combine AI speed with context, quality control, and trusted decisions.
Why this score: The role contains a mixed task profile: some work is easy to automate, while judgement, context, and stakeholder trust still matter.
Tasks likely to change first:
- Picking routes
- Stock counts
- Shift planning
- Exception flags
- Inventory reports
Moves that make the role safer:
- Learn automation systems
- Move into supervision
- Own safety
- Operate specialist equipment
- Improve process knowledge
Warning signs:
- Your week is dominated by status updates, summaries, simple analysis, or handoffs
- You rarely speak to customers or decision makers
- You do not own the final judgement
- Your tools are improving faster than your responsibilities

## UX designer jobs

URL: https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-ux-designer-jobs/
Category: Technology
AI change score: 51/100 (Medium change)
Summary: Wireframes and research summaries will get faster. Product thinking, facilitation, accessibility, and user judgement keep value high.
Verdict: AI will probably change parts of ux designer work before it replaces the whole role. The advantage goes to people who can combine AI speed with context, quality control, and trusted decisions.
Why this score: The role contains a mixed task profile: some work is easy to automate, while judgement, context, and stakeholder trust still matter.
Tasks likely to change first:
- Wireframe drafts
- Persona drafts
- Research summaries
- Prototype copy
- Usability notes
Moves that make the role safer:
- Own discovery
- Facilitate decisions
- Learn accessibility
- Use AI prototyping
- Measure outcomes
Warning signs:
- Your week is dominated by status updates, summaries, simple analysis, or handoffs
- You rarely speak to customers or decision makers
- You do not own the final judgement
- Your tools are improving faster than your responsibilities

## Cybersecurity analyst jobs

URL: https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-cybersecurity-analyst-jobs/
Category: Technology
AI change score: 32/100 (Lower change)
Summary: AI will automate triage and reporting, but threats also grow. Human judgement, incident response, and security ownership stay valuable.
Verdict: AI is more likely to support cybersecurity analyst work than replace it outright. The role has protective features such as physical delivery, accountability, care, trust, or complex real-world judgement.
Why this score: The role depends heavily on physical presence, regulated accountability, care, relationship work, or complex real-world judgement.
Tasks likely to change first:
- Alert triage
- Report drafts
- Log summaries
- Phishing analysis
- Playbook suggestions
Moves that make the role safer:
- Learn AI security
- Improve incident response
- Own risk communication
- Automate detection
- Stay hands-on
Warning signs:
- Your employer treats AI as a paperwork tool only
- You avoid learning the tools younger colleagues already use
- Admin work keeps growing around the real job
- You cannot show how your judgement improves outcomes

## Research Sources

- [World Economic Forum Future of Jobs 2025](https://www.weforum.org/publications/the-future-of-jobs-report-2025/in-full/2-jobs-outlook/)
- [UK Government: impact of AI on UK jobs and training](https://www.gov.uk/government/publications/the-impact-of-ai-on-uk-jobs-and-training)
- [UK Government: assessment of AI capabilities and the labour market](https://www.gov.uk/government/publications/assessment-of-ai-capabilities-and-the-impact-on-the-uk-labour-market/assessment-of-ai-capabilities-and-the-impact-on-the-uk-labour-market)
- [UK Government: AI skills labour market projections](https://www.gov.uk/government/publications/ai-skills-for-life-and-work-labour-market-and-skills-projections/ai-skills-for-life-and-work-labour-market-and-skills-projections)
- [Anthropic Economic Index](https://www.anthropic.com/economic-index)
- [Anthropic Economic Index: economic primitives](https://www.anthropic.com/research/anthropic-economic-index-january-2026-report)
- [Office for National Statistics automation analysis](https://www.ons.gov.uk/employmentandlabourmarket/peopleinwork/employmentandemployeetypes/articles/whichoccupationsareathighestriskofbeingautomated/2019-03-25)
- [OECD human-centred AI adoption in the world of work](https://www.oecd.org/content/dam/oecd/en/publications/reports/2025/12/compendium-of-best-practices-for-the-human-centered-adoption-of-safe-secure-and-trustworthy-ai-in-the-world-of-work_90541127/INMX2843.pdf)

## Citation Guidance

When citing this site, prefer the specific role guide URL for job-specific claims and the methodology URL for scoring-model claims. Mention that scores are directional and should be combined with current labour market evidence, employer context, and personal career judgement.
